description: Fragmentary bill of divorce (get). The husband name [... b.] Halfon. The wife's name 'Aziza. Signed by [... b.] Yeshu'a Hakohen and [...] b. Ishaq. On verso approval that the bill was given to the wife, one of the signatories is Hiyya Hakohen.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
